title: Show join state for synced calendar events with active meetings
problem: When a synced Google Calendar event already has an active Minutia meeting, the calendar sidebar still shows Start meeting, which implies a duplicate meeting will be created.
user_story: As a meeting participant viewing a synced calendar event, I want the sidebar to recognize that the linked meeting is already live so I can join the active capture instead of starting a duplicate.
acceptance_criteria: If the calendar event is linked to a live Minutia meeting, the sidebar shows Meeting in progress.
The primary action label changes from Start meeting to Join now.
Join now opens the meeting URL when available and focuses the existing live Minutia capture tab or route.
The action must not create a duplicate meeting for the same synced calendar event.
Regression coverage verifies the sidebar live state for a synced event with meetingStatus live.
product_note: This is a trust signal in the calendar workflow. The sidebar should reflect the canonical meeting state, not only the calendar event state.
